name: @prune/task-ledger
description: F11 — cost-per-completed-task ledger. Makes the TASK (not the request) the accounting unit: aggregates caller-supplied per-request spend events into tasks, divides by an accepted-outcome signal, and surfaces the retry/dead-end spend that per-request rollups hide. Honest pricing (null on unpriced model); never fabricates a number. No regex, no model call.
